name: doc-detective
description: Documentation testing and validation using Doc Detective. Test documentation procedures, convert docs to executable test specs, and validate that documented workflows match actual application behavior.

interface.shortDescription: Documentation testing and workflow validation tools.
interface.longDescription: Documentation testing and validation using Doc Detective. Test documentation procedures, convert docs to executable test specs, and validate that documented workflows match actual application behavior.
defaultPrompt: Use Doc Detective to test documentation procedures.
Use Doc Detective to validate that documented workflows work correctly.
